description: WASM browser kernel — compiles portable traits to wasm32-unknown-unknown, provides browser-side dispatch, registry, and secrets

features.name: WASM kernel initialization
features.description: init() boots the WASM registry, marks callable traits, and initializes the platform abstraction layer

features.name: WASM trait dispatch
features.description: Auto-generated dispatch table from .trait.toml files with wasm = true (generated by wasm/build.rs)

features.name: WASM registry
features.description: Lightweight HashMap-based trait registry for browser (no DashMap needed in single-threaded WASM)

features.name: WASM secrets store
features.description: In-memory secret storage for the browser environment (Mutex<HashMap>)
